page.name: FX1 16
page.pad1: effect_active 'echo' ? effect_active 'echo' off : effect_select_multi 1 'echo' & effect_active 'echo' on
page.pad2: effect_active 'reverb' ? effect_active 'reverb' off : effect_select_multi 1 'reverb' & effect_active 'reverb' on
page.pad3: effect_active 'flanger' ? effect_active 'flanger' off : effect_select_multi 1 'flanger' & effect_active 'flanger' on
page.pad4: effect_active 'phaser' ? effect_active 'phaser' off : effect_select_multi 1 'phaser' & effect_active 'phaser' on
page.pad5: effect_active 'filter hp' ? effect_active 'filter hp' off : effect_select_multi 1 'filter hp' & effect_active 'filter hp' on
page.pad6: effect_active 'filter lp' ? effect_active 'filter lp' off : effect_select_multi 1 'filter lp' & effect_active 'filter lp' on
page.pad7: effect_active 'loop roll' ? effect_active 'loop roll' off : effect_select_multi 1 'loop roll' & effect_active 'loop roll' on
page.pad8: effect_active 'beatgrid' ? effect_active 'beatgrid' off : effect_select_multi 1 'beatgrid' & effect_active 'beatgrid' on
page.pad9: effect_active 'brakeStart' ? effect_active 'brakeStart' off : effect_select_multi 1 'brakeStart' & effect_active 'brakeStart' on
page.pad10: effect_active 'distortion' ? effect_active 'distortion' off : effect_select_multi 1 'distortion' & effect_active 'distortion' on
page.pad11: effect_active 'ringmod' ? effect_active 'ringmod' off : effect_select_multi 1 'ringmod' & effect_active 'ringmod' on
page.pad12: effect_active 'bitcrusher' ? effect_active 'bitcrusher' off : effect_select_multi 1 'bitcrusher' & effect_active 'bitcrusher' on
page.pad13: effect_active 'tremolo' ? effect_active 'tremolo' off : effect_select_multi 1 'tremolo' & effect_active 'tremolo' on
page.pad14: effect_active 'wahwah' ? effect_active 'wahwah' off : effect_select_multi 1 'wahwah' & effect_active 'wahwah' on
page.pad15: effect_active 'backspin' ? effect_active 'backspin' off : effect_select_multi 1 'backspin' & effect_active 'backspin' on
page.pad16: effect_active 'echo out' ? effect_active 'echo out' off : effect_select_multi 1 'echo out' & effect_active 'echo out' on
